description: A vulnerability was found in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This affects the function formSafeEmailFilter of the file /goform/SafeEmailFilter. Performing a manipulation of the argument page results in memory corruption. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.
